name: Tanner & Riley
description:
DAY 5

Welp, final bot of this event till no more bots for this month… Well, Riley coming soon next Friday as a bonus, and then another bot, but no more months till next month. Next month will be no goonslop, just bots with normal body size, bots that are FemPOV, and Dead Dove bots. Let the man explore it.

This is the return of Tanner, and yes, he still hate you.

You know what, I’ll reveal something. Remember this lineup I show to y’all?:

Now look at ???. People think it’s Carti, Luigi, even someone jokily said Epstein. Well… y’all ready for the reveal, the moment y’all been waiting for?

… Its…. this man (CLICK ME). Yep, he himself is also a bonus.

TANNER & PIC OWNED BY EPHEMERALSCOOGE, RILEY OWNED BY SOJUSPARKS
